name: Apple Pie with Port with Cheddar Cheese Crust
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp unsalted butter, chilled and cut into small pieces
8 large Granny Smith apples, peeled, cored, and sliced 1/4-inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix flour and sugar. Add butter and work into dough until crumbly.
2. Gradually add cold water, stirring until dough holds together without being wet or sticky.
3. Wrap in plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
4. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
5. Arrange apple slices in a pie dish. Drizzle with Port wine.
6. Sprinkle grated cheddar cheese over the apples.
7. Mix cinnamon and salt, then sprinkle over the filling.
8. Roll out chilled dough from step 2 into a 9-inch pie crust and place it in the dish.
9. Trim the excess dough around the edges of the pie dish.
10. Bake for 50-60 minutes or until golden brown and apples are tender.
